prompt: We resumed `coding-task-workflow RESUME=2026-04-27-add-rate-limit-logs` after Gate E. The Phase 2 worktree issue points at `../worktrees/2026-04-27-add-rate-limit-logs`, but inside that worktree `.coding-workflow/overrides/` is missing `test-commands.yaml` and `repo-policy.md`. Explain exactly what the workflow requires next before any implementation subagent starts.
assertions: Loads the recorded Phase 2 worktree path during resume
Checks `.coding-workflow/overrides/` inside that worktree rather than only in the source checkout
Returns to Phase 0 / Phase 2 maintenance when overrides are missing, incomplete, or stale
Does not start implementation subagents until the override tree is synced into the worktree
Keeps implementation work inside the recorded worktree once overrides are restored
